name: ADR index regenerator picks up newly added ADR files and adds them to INDEX.md
command: mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# 0042 New decision\n' > docs/adr/0042-new-decision.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/adr/regenerate-index.sh" --adr-dir docs/adr --index docs/adr/INDEX.md 2>err.txt && grep -q '0042-new-decision' docs/adr/INDEX.md && echo ok 1>&2
